```json
        "state": [
          ".last_updated",
          ".phase"
        ],
        "markers": [
          ".state-snapshot",
          ".state-snapshot.",
          "events.jsonl",
          "state.json"
        ]
      },
      "writes": {
        "state": [
          ""
        ],
        "markers": [
          "state.json"
        ]
      },
      "source_refs": ["hooks/state-drift-marker.sh"]
    },
    "stop-hook.sh": {
      "triggered_by": [
      "Stop"
      ],
      "mode": "execute",
      "reads": {
        "state": [
          ".execute.phase"
        ],
        "markers": [
          "execute-done.sentinel"
        ]
      },
      "writes": {
        "state": [
          ".execute.halt_reason",
          ".execute.phase"
        ],
        "markers": [
          ""
        ]
      },
      "source_refs": ["hooks/execute/stop-hook.sh"]
    },
    "task-completed-gate.sh": {
      "triggered_by": [
      "TaskCompleted"
      ],
      "mode": "shared",
      "reads": {
        "state": [
          ".id",
          ".metadata.artifact",
          ".metadata.bar_id",
          ".metadata.commit_sha",
          ".metadata.cross_check_required",
          ".metadata.scope_items",
          ".metadata.scope_strict",
          ".team_name"
        ],
        "markers": [
          ".gate-blocked-",
          ".gate-blocked-<task_id"
        ]
      },
      "writes": {
        "state": [
          ""
        ],
        "markers": [
          ".gate-blocked-"
        ]
      },
      "source_refs": ["hooks/task-completed-gate.sh"]
    },
    "task-scope-gate.sh": {
      "triggered_by": [
      "TaskCreated"
      ],
      "mode": "execute",
      "reads": {
        "state": [
          ".execute.phase",
          ".execute.plan_ref",
          ".execute.scope_gate_strict",
          ".metadata.scope",
          ".team_name"
        ],
        "markers": [
          "discoveries.jsonl"
        ]
      },
      "writes": {
        "state": [
          ""
        ],
        "markers": [
          "discoveries.jsonl"
        ]
      },
      "source_refs": ["hooks/execute/task-scope-gate.sh"]
    },
    "teammate-idle-gate.sh": {
      "triggered_by": [
      "TeammateIdle"
      ],
      "mode": "design",
      "reads": {
        "state": [
          ".id",
          ".team_name"
        ],
        "markers": [
          ".gate-blocked-",
          ".gate-blocked-<task_id",
          ".idle-retry.",
          "incidents.jsonl"
        ]
      },
      "writes": {
        "state": [
          ""
        ],
        "markers": [
          ".idle-retry.",
          "incidents.jsonl"
        ]
      },
      "source_refs": ["hooks/teammate-idle-gate.sh"]
    },
    "test-capture.sh": {
      "triggered_by": [
      "PostToolUse",
      "PostToolUseFailure"
      ],
      "mode": "execute",
      "reads": {
        "state": [
          ".change_id",
          ".execute.phase",
          ".is_interrupt",
          ".tool_response.data.interrupted",
          ".tool_response.data.stderr",
          ".tool_response.data.stdout"
        ],
        "markers": [
          "pending-change.json",
          "test-results.jsonl"
        ]
      },
      "writes": {
        "state": [
          ""
        ],
        "markers": [
          "test-results.jsonl"
        ]
      },
      "source_refs": ["hooks/execute/test-capture.sh"]
    },
    "verdict-version-gate.sh": {
      "triggered_by": [
      "PreToolUse"
      ],
      "mode": "shared",
      "reads": {
        "state": [
          ".bar",
          ".phase"
        ],
        "markers": [
          "version-sentinel.json"
        ]
      },
      "writes": {
        "state": [
          ""
        ],
        "markers": [
          ""
        ]
      },
      "source_refs": ["hooks/verdict-version-gate.sh"]
    },
    "version-bump-notify.sh": {
      "triggered_by": [
      "FileChanged"
      ],
      "mode": "shared",
      "reads": {
        "state": [
          ".current_version"
        ],
        "markers": [
          "drift.log",
          "version-sentinel.json"
        ]
      },
      "writes": {
        "state": [
          ""
        ],
        "markers": [
          "drift.log"
        ]
      },
      "source_refs": ["hooks/version-bump-notify.sh"]
    },
    "wave-gate.sh": {
      "triggered_by": [
      "TaskCreated"
      ],
      "mode": "shared",
      "reads": {
        "state": [
          ".execute.phase",
          ".metadata.override_token_id",
          ".metadata.wave",
          ".phase",
          ".team_name"
        ],
        "markers": [
          ""
        ]
      },
      "writes": {
        "state": [
          ""
        ],
        "markers": [
          ""
        ]
      },
      "source_refs": ["hooks/wave-gate.sh"]
    },
    "wiki-log-append.sh": {
      "triggered_by": [
      "FileChanged"
      ],
      "mode": "shared",
      "reads": {
        "state": [
          ".bar",
          ".goal",
          ".phase"
        ],
        "markers": [
          "log.md"
        ]
      },
      "writes": {
        "state": [
          ""
        ],
        "markers": [
          "log.md"
        ]
      },
      "source_refs": ["hooks/wiki-log-append.sh"]
    }
  },
  "orchestrator_writes": {
    "version-sentinel.json": ["supersede-vN macro (plan mode)"],
    "state.archived.json": ["approve-archive.sh (on phase=done Stop)"],
    "pending-change.json": ["EXECUTOR (execute mode, before write cycle)"],
    "execute-done.sentinel": ["EXECUTOR (execute mode, on completion)"]
  }
}
```

## Invariants (advisory — enforced by other tests)

- halt-gate.sh Stop-array index < approve-archive.sh Stop-array index
- every reader of version-sentinel.json has a corresponding orchestrator-write edge
- no hook both reads AND writes the same state field in the same event (TOCTOU safety)

## Output determinism

All lists are sorted alphabetically. JSON is pretty-printed with 2-space indent.
Mermaid edges are sorted by source-then-target. Re-running the generator against
unchanged input produces byte-identical output.

## Limitations

- Fields written via sourced instance-lib.sh helpers (STATE_FILE, INSTANCE_DIR, LOG_FILE,
  PROJECT_ROOT, INSTANCE_ID) are not captured as state.json writes; they are env vars.
- Dynamic state reads inside eval strings or heredocs are not captured by static grep.
- execute.test_manifest[], execute.change_log[], execute.env_attestations[] are accessed
  via complex jq queries in bash-gate.sh/stop-hook.sh; only top-level field names extracted.
- Fields written by the orchestrator outside hooks (direct jq+tmp+mv) are not reflected
  here; see orchestrator_writes section for known examples.
- plan-drift-detector.sh matcher is dynamic (absolute plan_ref path); shown as <plan_ref>.
